work.title: Systems that learn without becoming vague.
work.body: I build the operating layer around agents: memory, harnesses, review loops, and small interfaces that make autonomous work inspectable.
panelItems: memory and context that survive sessions
review loops for work that should not run blind

notes.title: Build the system before the myth gets clean.
notes.body: Useful work starts rough: a stubborn workflow, a fragile loop, a prototype with one honest question and enough instrumentation to answer it.
panelItems: prefer small interfaces with deep internals
keep proofs inspectable and claims modest
let running software clarify the taste

contact.title: Bring the edge case.
contact.body: Send the workflow, the failure mode, and the part that refuses to become a product brief. I will tell you what I would build first.
contact.panelTitle: Good briefs have a live constraint.
